111352.title: Paw Patrol.

choices: A sumo wrestling tournament and bodybuilding event to enter.
1113521.content:
The Place: Adventure Bay.

The Year: 2020.

The Story: Our story opens in Adventure Bay as it was a beautiful sunny day, as it was business as usual at Paw Patrol headquarters as the Paw Patrol's own pups who happened to be big and fat by the way, Chase Marshall Rubble Zuma Rocky Skye Everest and Tracker happened to be outside, as Chase was doing some weightlifting, Marshall and Rubble happen to be training themselves to become sumo wrestlers as both of them happened to be engaged in a friendly sumo wrestling match, Rocky was meditating while Skye Everest and Tracker happened to be relaxing in a big enough hot tub.

At that moment the Paw Patrol's pups own leader Ryder needed the Paw Patrol's pups to come to the lookout.

"Paw Patrol to the Lookout " Ryder said.

"Ryder needs us." The pups said in unison as they made their way over to the lookout's elevator as Marshall due to his own clumsiness rolled towards the others like a bowling ball as they tried to warn him to watch out but it was too late as Marshall collided with them.

"Well at least I got a strike." Marshall said as his teammates laughed as they as they stepped into the elevator itself as they then reached the top of the lookout and exited the elevator as they immediately stood before Ryder.

"Paw Patrol ready for action Ryder sir." Chase said.

Ryder then revealed the pups assignment as there was an....
1113521.title: The Paw Patrol's pups were big.

121.content:
Amahara Yukino the blonde hair master trap was walking around town, he was looking for his next target. He loved convincing adorable boys into becoming traps themselves. He was skipping and humming, as he looking around. He was wearing a adorable blue dress with white frills, blue thigh high stockings, and pair of lace blue panties and black heel. He also wore his short blonde hair in two small twin tails with adorable blue ribbons.

He spotted a book store and thought he could find something interesting to convert into a trap. So he entered the store, he was disappointed that the store was empty. He frowned and was about to leave, when he spotted a weird looking red book. The title was only Clow and had a giant gold lion with wings on it. He thought it looked interesting, so he picked it up and bought it.

He returned home to look at it. Once he was in his room, he began to examined the book. He opened it and to his surprised it had a deck of cards in it. He picked one up, it had a beauty ethereal female spirit on it. The name was on the bottom, she was called Windy.

He whispered the name and then suddenly a powerful whirlwind surrounded him. He closed his eyes, and unbeknownst to him the other cards flew out of his window. Then as suddenly as the whirlwind started it ended. Amahara saw his room was surprisedly not that messed up. He smiled for that, but he looked back into the book. He saw all of the rest of the cards where gone.

He was still holding the Windy Card, then suddenly the book started glowing. He dropped the book and then suddenly something came out of it.

Amahara grinned, as it was an adorable stuff animal.

" So cute." Said Amahara, as he grabbed it.

" I'm not cute, I'm Cerberus the Guardian Beast of the Clow." Said Cerberus, as he flew out of Amahara' hands and landed on his bed.

" You look like a plushie to me." Said Amahara, smiling.

" Listen, you might be an adorable young lady but I'm a powerful magical creature." Said Cerberus, puff up his chest. Amahara blushed, he loved being called adorable.

" I protect the Clow." Said Cerberus, as he picked up the Clow. Then he realized it was empty.

" What happened !" Shouted Cerberus, as he started panicking.

" I'm sorry, but I released them." Said Amahara, apologizing.

Cerberus sighed, " Well since you released them. You have to catch them." Said Cerberus, as he pulled out a pink key, with a gold head, with white wings and a red beak. The key flowed into Amahara's hands and then transformed into a wand.

Amahara was speechless, as he looked at the gorgeous wand.

" I get to be a magical girl." Said Amahara, as he jumped for joy.

" Listen young lady, you might think this is all fun and games but it can be dangerous." Said Cerberus, Amahara just smirked.

He had defeated street gangs before, she could handle anything that was thrown at him.

" By the way, I'm a guy." Said Amahara, smiling at Cerberus.

Cerberus started laughing, " You're to pretty yo be a guy." Said Cerberus, Amahara sighed and flashed his panties.

Cerberus gulped, " Well, well." Said Cerberus, as he didn't know what to say.

" I just loving dressing up as a girl and girly things." Said Amahara, his room was pink, filled with lace and frills and had tons of stuff animals in it.

" OK." Said Cerberus.

" Cerberus is to long of a name, how about I call toy Kero-Kun." Said Amahara, smirking.

Cerberus frowned, he was the guardian beast of the Clow not a stuff animal.

" Would Kero-Kun like some pudding." Said Amahara, smiling.

" Yes, please !" Shouted Kero-Kun.

Amahara lead Kero to the kitchen and feed him pudding until he fell asleep.

What happened next ?

Option 1: Amahara capture his first card. ( R.C. on which one)

Option 2: A cute boy transferred into school.
121.title: Cardcaptor Sakura and Amahara-kun+

1212.content:
Amahara walked to school in the female school uniform, which was a blue and white sailor fuku, blue pleated skirt and shoes. He wore a pair of white lace panties and black thigh high stockings as well. He was smiling, as he was now a magical girl. He wish he could tell somebody, but Kero-Kun promised him to keep it a secret. He signed, but at least he can design adorable costumes to wear. So he arrived at class and sat down.

When class started, the teacher said they have a transfer student from Hong Kong. This surprised everyone, the teacher waved the student in. Amahara smirked, as a boy his age walked in. He was adorable, with cute messing brown hair and cute amber eyes. Why he carried himself like a guy, he kind of look like a girl. This was going to be fun, he thought. He found his next target, as he licked his lips.

" Class, this is Syaoran Li from Hong Kong." Said The teacher, the class said hello. Syaoran keep a cold neutral stare, as he scan the room. Then he stopped on Amahara and for a few seconds glared at him.

Amahara just smile back.

" Mr. Yukino." Said The Teacher, he stood up.

Syaoran was stunned, the teacher said mister but a cute girl stood up. This puzzled Syaoran, but he just shrugged for know.

" Would you show Mr. Li around the school and help him get settle." Said The Teacher, smiling.

" It would be my pleasure." Said Amahara, with his famous mischievous grin. The class gulped, this made Syaoran curious.

Syaoran was assigned the seat behind Amahara, as class soon started. During lunch Amahara showed Syaoran the school, when they arrived at a isolated spot. Syaoran stopped and pulled a weird looking board. Amahara was curious on where Syaoran his that. Then Syaoran started chanting, then a blue light shot out of the board and hit Amahara. This cause the key to started glowing.

" So it's you, hand over the key and Clow." Said Syaoran, glaring at Amahara.

Amahara just smirked and giggled, as Syaoran just frowned.

" No." Said Amahara, smiling.

" You don't understand what you got yourself into girl." Said Syaoran, this made Amahara laughed.

Syaoran growled, " First, thanks I love it when people think I'm a cute girl but I'm a guy." Said Amahara, grinning.

Syaoran just stared at him, then suddenly Amahara flashed him and Syaoran blushed. He was confuse, he saw a bulge in the panties. He looked at Amahara with bewilderment.

" I love girl clothes and girly things." Said Amahara, grinning. He didn't tell Syaoran about his hobbies of turning cute boy like him into his trap slaves. He will learn that soon enough.

" If you're a boy, it doesn't make a different. I'm Syaoran Li, prodigy of the Li Clan and descendant of Clow Reed himself." Said Syaoran, as he puff out his chest.

Amahara smirked, Syaoran had a lot of pride. This will make breaking him even more fun.

" Sorry, but Kero-Kun. Said I have to capture the cards." Said Amahara, smiling.

" Kero-Kun, you mean Cerberus the guardian beast." Said Syaoran, Amahara nodded.

" Why would he pick someone like you, I was trained since birth to be the best in everything and a man among men." Said Syaoran, puffing out his chest again.

He loved his masculinity too, taking that away from him was going to be so delicious.

" Man Among men, I say you look better in a dress." Said Amahara, smirking.

This made Syaoran blushed and foamed.

" I'm a proud guy and not some crossdresser !" Shouted Syaoran, Amahara just giggled.

" I bet you would look so adorable in a the girl's uniform." Said Amahara, this made Syaoran growled.

What happened next ?

Option 1: Skip to P.E. as Amahara and Syaoran faced in other in a sport ( R.C. on what).

Option 2: Skip to the end of school

Option 3: Skip to Amahara and Syaoran facing against a Clow card ( R.C. on which one)
1212.title: Syaoran arrived
